title: anthurium × roseum
intro: Anthurium × roseum, also known as the Queen of the Night, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Arum family. The plant is prized for its heart-shaped flowers and medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The leaves and flowers of the plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced pain and inflammation. The plant's leaves can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in herbal preparations to create ointments and creams for topical application.
